channel.title: Sayr Olivares - Writing and Coding Blog
channel.description: Portfolio posts on SEO, automation, coding, and data science.

item.title: The process decisions that actually help a small team scale operations
item.description: Which process decisions create leverage for small teams and which ones create drag.

item.title: How I design SEO systems that stay useful after algorithm changes
item.description: Framework for durable SEO systems that survive algorithm changes.

item.title: Cleaning noisy ecommerce data with Pandas in 6 reusable steps
item.description: Reusable process for cleaning ecommerce datasets with Pandas.

item.title: How I think about pricing automation by the cost of delay
item.description: Framework for evaluating automation work by the cost of delay.

item.title: What studying computer science changed in how I lead projects
item.description: How formal CS study improved leadership decisions and planning quality.

item.title: The exact workflow I used to cut repetitive operations by 95%
item.description: Automation design pattern using Zapier for operational efficiency.

item.title: The weekly operating review I use to keep teams aligned without wasting time
item.description: A simple weekly operating review format for alignment, blockers, and decision tracking.

item.title: My current framework for learning AI without getting distracted
item.description: A practical AI learning framework centered on outputs and focus.

item.title: From manual setup to documented infrastructure decisions
item.description: How lightweight infrastructure decisions improve cloud operations.
